title: Half-naked body of woman (24) found
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The half-naked body of a...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The half-naked body of a 24-year-old woman was found in New Rest in Mossel Bay on Saturday.

Police spokesperson, Sgt Chris Spies says residents made the gruesome discovery in a bushy area in KwaNonqaba at around 06:50.


> Spies says police were called to the scene and shortly thereafter paramedics declared the victim dead.


He says the motive for the killing is not yet known.

Read more on www.mosselbayadvertiser.com

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
